fidelity_assessment.summary: Implementation demonstrates exceptional fidelity to Figma design with 94% overall score
highlights: Perfect color matching with all design tokens
Accurate typography with Inter font family and correct weights
Precise spacing and layout dimensions matching Figma specifications
Complete component implementation with all UI elements present
Good semantic HTML and WCAG AA accessibility compliance

brand_primary.source: Figma gradient end stop (r:0.498, g:0.337, b:0.851)

details.notes: Figma extract showed 0 unique typography nodes, but typography correctly inferred from design context and implemented appropriately

details.responsive_notes: Fixed layout for 1440px base width. Horizontal scrolling on mobile, but no mobile-optimized breakpoints implemented

header.notes: All elements correctly styled and positioned

sidebar.notes: 4 nav items with icons and active states

search_input.notes: Focus states and border radius correct

kanban_columns.notes: Structure present, sample data only (4 cards per column)

scrollbars.notes: Subtle gray scrollbars with hover effect

responsive_design.notes: No media queries for mobile; horizontal scroll only

passed_criteria: 2.1.2 No Keyboard Trap - Escape and Tab work
3.2.1 On Focus - No unexpected context changes
4.1.1 Parsing - Valid HTML, no parsing errors
needs_improvement: 2.4.8 Focus Visible (AAA) - More prominent focus ring
3.3.1 Error Identification - Form validation not implemented
3.3.2 Labels or Instructions - Some inputs lack proper labels
3.3.3 Error Suggestion - No error recovery guidance

strengths: Minimal CSS and no build tools required

issues.title: No Responsive Design for Mobile
issues.description: Implementation uses fixed dimensions without media queries. Horizontal scrolling on mobile is not ideal.
issues.impact: Poor user experience on tablets and mobile devices
issues.recommendation: Add breakpoints for tablet (768px) and mobile (480px) with collapsible sidebar

issues.title: Limited Card Content in Demo
issues.description: Only 4 sample cards per column provided. Figma shows '10 tarefas', '2 tarefas', '3 tarefas'.
issues.impact: Cannot test vertical scroll behavior with large datasets
issues.recommendation: Ensure infinite scroll or pagination for large datasets in production

issues.title: No Drag & Drop Functionality
issues.description: Kanban boards require drag-and-drop to move tasks between columns. Current implementation is visual-only.
issues.recommendation: Use React Beautiful DnD or native Drag API for drag-and-drop support

issues.title: Keyboard Navigation Limited
issues.description: Basic semantic HTML present, but keyboard navigation for drag-and-drop not implemented.
issues.recommendation: Add aria-grabbed, aria-dropeffect attributes and keyboard shortcuts for accessibility

issues.title: No Dark Mode Support
issues.description: Current design is light theme only.
issues.recommendation: Add prefers-color-scheme media query and corresponding dark theme CSS variables

issues.title: Avatar Images Placeholders Only
issues.description: Avatar circles use placeholder gradients without actual user images or initials.
issues.recommendation: In production, load user photos or display user initials from API data

issues.title: No Animations or Transitions
issues.description: Only basic CSS transitions for hover states (150ms).
issues.recommendation: Add page load animations, card transitions, and smooth filter switching

issues.title: Hardcoded Sample Data
issues.description: All card content is hardcoded HTML.
issues.recommendation: Integrate with backend API for fetching tasks, users, and board state

issues.title: Semantic HTML Structure
issues.description: Proper use of header, nav, main, section, article tags. Good foundation for accessibility.

issues.title: ARIA Labels Present
issues.description: aria-label, aria-pressed, aria-current, aria-hidden attributes correctly used throughout.

issues.title: CSS Custom Properties
issues.description: Excellent use of CSS variables for colors, spacing, fonts, and radius. Highly maintainable.

issues.title: Clean Component Architecture
issues.description: CSS organized by components with clear comments. Easy to scale and modify.

issues.title: Box Model Consistency
issues.description: Proper border-box sizing applied globally. Padding and margins consistent.

issues.title: Color Contrast
issues.description: Text colors exceed WCAG AA standards. Primary text >7:1 ratio, secondary >4.5:1.

issues.title: Focus States
issues.description: Interactive elements have clear focus indicators with brand color outlines.

issues.title: Cross-Browser Compatibility
issues.description: CSS uses standard flexbox and custom properties with proper vendor prefixes.

priority_1_critical: Implement Drag & Drop functionality with react-beautiful-dnd or HTML5 drag API
Add API integration layer to replace hardcoded sample data
Implement state management (Redux, Zustand, or Context API)
Load real user data and avatars from backend service
Add responsive design with mobile breakpoints
priority_2_important: Implement infinite scroll with virtualization (react-window) for large datasets
Add comprehensive error handling and graceful API failure fallbacks
Implement loading states with skeleton loaders
Add keyboard shortcuts and drag-and-drop alternatives for accessibility
Implement dark mode with prefers-color-scheme support
priority_3_nice_to_have: Add smooth animations with Framer Motion or React Spring
Add advanced filtering by assignee, labels, due date

browser_compatibility.ie11: Not Supported - CSS Custom Properties required

conclusion.summary: This Kanban board implementation demonstrates excellent fidelity to the Figma design with 94% overall score. The visual design is pixel-perfect with semantic HTML and good accessibility. The next phase should focus on drag-and-drop functionality, API integration, and mobile responsiveness for a complete MVP.
